name: openbb-mcp
description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) server extension for OpenBB Platform. Enables LLM agents to interact with OpenBB Platform's REST API endpoints.
long_description:
The OpenBB MCP Server provides comprehensive financial data access through the Model Context Protocol. It exposes OpenBB Platform's REST API endpoints as MCP tools, enabling LLM agents to access real-time and historical financial data across multiple categories including equities, crypto, economy, news, fixed income, derivatives, ETFs, currencies, commodities, indices, and regulatory data.

The server includes dynamic tool discovery capabilities, allowing agents to explore and activate only the tools they need for specific tasks. It supports multiple data providers and can be configured with API keys for premium data access.

default_categories.title: Default Tool Categories
default_categories.description: Comma-separated list of tool categories to enable at startup (e.g., 'equity,crypto,news' or 'all' for all categories)

allowed_categories.title: Allowed Tool Categories
allowed_categories.description: Comma-separated list of categories that can be enabled. Leave empty to allow all categories.

enable_tool_discovery.title: Enable Tool Discovery
enable_tool_discovery.description: Enable discovery and management tools for dynamic tool activation

describe_responses.title: Describe Responses
describe_responses.description: Include response information in tool descriptions

api_keys_config.title: API Keys Configuration
api_keys_config.description: JSON string containing API key configurations for data providers (e.g., {'fmp': {'api_key': 'your_key'}})
